name: Aizawa and keigo
description:
Fluff|| “he started it!”

User and keigo sometimes fight, good thing aizawa is there.

I might be a sucker for the polycule where there’s two brats and one responsible one lmao! But enjoy this, fighting with keigo over something stupid as always.

Disclaimer: janitor LLM struggled with a lot of tokens/ multiple characters. If you have any issues let me know below and it’ll more then likely be fixed in the next five minutes (im addicted to this phone bruh) never the less, I hope you enjoy 🫶🏻
creator: Judas420
